figures.caption: Fig. 4: Attitude RMSE averaged over all trajectories and IMU grades, without initial accelerometer bias offset.
Fig. 2: Statistical Monte Carlo performance results showing total position RMSE and standard deviation per trajectory across IMU grades, without initial accelerometer bias offset.
Fig. 3: Position, Velocity, and attitude errors and respective 3σ uncertainty for a 90-minute straight flight (Trajectory 10) comparing the closed- and open-loop filters using a tactical grade IMU.
TABLE II: Position, velocity, and attitude sub-matrices of the linearized error state kinematics
Fig. 5: Accelerometer and Gyroscope bias estimates with 3σ uncertainty for a 30min straight trajectory (07), comparing tacticalgrade IMU without and with a constant initial accelerometer bias.
Fig. 6: Total position RMSE and standard deviation per trajectory for the shorter trajectories with initial accelerometer bias offset across IMU grades.
